none.justification: Correctly flags that src/utils/list.c does not exist, gives the struct definition with next/prev, and redirects to list.h with the complete six inline functions plus the relevant iterator/accessor macros.

ccodegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: it explicitly notes the nonexistent list.c, identifies struct dl_list correctly, and lists all six inline operations and the macro helpers in list.h.

lsp.justification: Correctly states list.c is absent, provides the right struct definition, and covers the complete header-only API including init/add/add_tail/del/empty/len and the iteration/access macros.
